## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior change (`make test` passes locally)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added (if user-visible)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior, API, or CLI changed)
- [ ] Nepali / Hindi microcopy reviewed by ≥1 native speaker (if microcopy touched)
- [ ] No PII in commits, tests, fixtures, or screenshots (synthetic data only)
- [ ] If touching dispatch logic, regression test added per `.claude/plans/03_test-plan.md` IRON RULE
- [ ] If touching protocol surface (OpenAPI / OpenRPC), version-bump considered per SemVer policy
